parsed_review.summary: CP00-556 (RP18.P02.M04.S11-S20, risk A, 10 units, "Secondary Workflow Slice") passes independent read-only review with no blocking findings. Plan pack, review baseline, manifest, registry binding (registry.js:86-101), CP556_REQUIREMENTS (registry.js:678-717), service descriptor (service.js:733-804), validators (validators.js:1035-1202), and the contract (current_pack, p02_workflow_slice_descriptor@6748, cp556_requirements, cp556_no_write_attestation, historical_pack_bindings tail@7142) are mutually consistent. Deliverable distribution ui:2/implementation:3/claude_review:1/failure_recovery:2/test:2 matches across plan and requirements. Handoff chain is correct: CP00-555 next_subphase=S11 equals this pack's first unit; this pack hands off to CP00-557 at S21 (closeout-pack-plan.json:530-541). Tests (model.test.js:389-437) and the RP18 validator (validate-rp18-...mjs:323-353, deepEqual descriptor-vs-contract) exercise CP556; command-evidence.json records all required validations at exit 0 including npm test and git diff --check. Boundaries hold: src/ contains no process.env/child_process/fs.write/fetch/eval, descriptors are pure deterministic frozen objects, production_ready=false and runtime_ready=false are preserved (no gate weakening), and every no-write/no-real-data/no-runtime flag is attested. Authority boundary is intact (claude_is_final_approval=false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false); Hermes H18 is a deterministic control-plane validation gate (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false), not embedded product runtime. CP178+ hardening checks pass: readiness auth preflight succeeded with non-zero valid-JSON stdout and no forbidden review-evidence patterns. Absence of claude-review-result/adjudication/construction-inspection is expected, as this is the read_only_claude_run step that precedes them. Pack is a faithful continuation of the validated CP551-CP555 descriptor-only pattern.
